structs.name: Entry

enums.name: BTreeSeekBias
enums.definition:
enum BTreeSeekBias {
    Exact,
    GreaterOrEqual,
    Greater,
    LessOrEqual,
    Less,
    First,
    Last
}

enums.name: MaxSupplyMode

functions.name: assert
functions.comment: Fails execution if the condition is false.

functions.name: burn
functions.comment: Burns an asset amount from the current contract balance.

functions.name: debug
functions.comment: Prints a value to standard output using its debug representation.

functions.name: emit_event
functions.comment: Emits a contract event with arguments for listeners.

functions.name: fire_rpc_event
functions.comment: Records an RPC event for off-chain applications.

functions.name: get_account_balance_for_asset
functions.signature: get_account_balance_for_asset(address: Address, asset: Hash) ⟶ optional<(u64, Ciphertext)>
functions.comment: Returns an account balance ciphertext and fetched topoheight for the asset, if any.

functions.name: get_balance_for_asset
functions.comment: Returns the current contract balance for the given asset, if any.

functions.name: get_caller
functions.comment: Returns the caller account address, if any.

functions.name: get_contract_balance_for_asset
functions.comment: Returns another contract's balance for the given asset, if any.

functions.name: get_contract_caller
functions.comment: Returns the calling contract hash, if any.

functions.name: get_contract_entry
functions.comment: Returns the initial contract hash used as the entry point.

functions.name: get_contract_hash
functions.comment: Returns the hash of the currently executing contract.

functions.name: get_cost_per_asset
functions.comment: Returns the asset creation cost in atomic units.

functions.name: get_cost_per_scheduled_execution
functions.comment: Returns the scheduled execution cost in atomic units.

functions.name: get_current_topoheight
functions.comment: Returns the current execution topoheight.

functions.name: get_deposit_for_asset
functions.comment: Returns the public deposit amount for the given asset, if any.

functions.name: get_deposits
functions.comment: Returns all public deposits received by this invocation.

functions.name: get_gas_limit
functions.comment: Returns the current VM gas limit.

functions.name: get_gas_usage
functions.comment: Returns the current gas used by the execution.

functions.name: get_xelis_asset
functions.comment: Returns the native XELIS asset hash.

functions.name: increase_gas_limit
functions.comment: Increases the VM gas limit using current contract funds.

functions.name: is_contract_callable
functions.comment: Returns whether a contract chunk is callable under current permissions.

functions.name: is_same_ptr
functions.comment: Returns true when both values point to the same underlying value.

functions.name: panic
functions.comment: Stops execution with the provided panic message.

functions.name: println
functions.comment: Prints a value to standard output using its display representation.

functions.name: require
functions.comment: Fails execution with the message if the condition is false.

functions.name: transfer
functions.signature: transfer(destination: Address, amount: u64, asset: Hash) ⟶ bool
functions.comment: Transfers an asset from the current contract to an account.

functions.name: transfer_contract
functions.signature: transfer_contract(contract: Hash, amount: u64, asset: Hash) ⟶ bool
functions.comment: Transfers an asset from the current contract to another contract.

functions.name: transfer_payload
functions.signature: transfer_payload(destination: Address, amount: u64, asset: Hash, payload: any) ⟶ bool
functions.comment: Transfers an asset to an account with an attached payload.

functions.name: xor_hashes
functions.comment: Returns the bytewise XOR of two hashes.

functions.name: from_be_bytes
functions.comment: Builds a U8 value from be-endian bytes.

functions.name: from_le_bytes
functions.comment: Builds a U8 value from le-endian bytes.

functions.name: checked_add
functions.comment: Returns the checked add result for U8 as an optional value.

functions.name: checked_div
functions.comment: Returns the checked division result for U8 as an optional value, failing on division by zero.

functions.name: checked_mul
functions.comment: Returns the checked mul result for U8 as an optional value.

functions.name: checked_pow
functions.comment: Returns the checked pow result for U8 as an optional value.

functions.name: checked_rem
functions.comment: Returns the checked remainder result for U8 as an optional value, failing on division by zero.

functions.name: checked_shl
functions.comment: Returns the checked shl result for U8 as an optional value.

functions.name: checked_shr
functions.comment: Returns the checked shr result for U8 as an optional value.

functions.name: checked_sub
functions.comment: Returns the checked sub result for U8 as an optional value.

functions.name: count_ones
functions.comment: Returns count_ones for this U8 value.

functions.name: count_zeros
functions.comment: Returns count_zeros for this U8 value.

functions.name: leading_ones
functions.comment: Returns leading_ones for this U8 value.

functions.name: leading_zeros
functions.comment: Returns leading_zeros for this U8 value.

functions.name: max
functions.comment: Returns the larger of this U8 value and another.

functions.name: min
functions.comment: Returns the smaller of this U8 value and another.

functions.name: pow
functions.comment: Returns the pow result for U8.

functions.name: reverse_bits
functions.comment: Returns this U8 value with its bits reversed.

functions.name: rotate_left
functions.comment: Returns the rotate_left result for U8.

functions.name: rotate_right
functions.comment: Returns the rotate_right result for U8.

functions.comment: Returns the saturating_add result for U8.

functions.comment: Returns the saturating division result for U8, failing on division by zero.

functions.comment: Returns the integer square root of this U8 value.

functions.name: to_bytes
functions.comment: Converts an array of u8 values into bytes.

functions.name: from_utf8
functions.comment: Builds a string from UTF-8 bytes, returning null when the bytes are invalid.

functions.name: from_utf8_lossy
functions.comment: Builds a string from bytes, replacing invalid UTF-8 sequences.

functions.name: char_at
functions.comment: Returns the character at the character index as a one-character string, or null if out of bounds.

functions.name: contains
functions.comment: Returns true when the string contains the substring.

functions.name: contains_ignore_case
functions.comment: Returns true when the string contains the substring, ignoring case.

functions.name: ends_with
functions.comment: Returns true when the string ends with the suffix.

functions.name: index_of
functions.comment: Returns the first byte index of the substring, or null if it is absent.

functions.name: is_empty
functions.comment: Returns true when the string has no bytes.

functions.name: last_index_of
functions.comment: Returns the last byte index of the substring, or null if it is absent.

functions.name: len
functions.comment: Returns the byte length of the string.

functions.name: matches
functions.comment: Returns all non-overlapping matches of the pattern.

functions.name: replace
functions.comment: Returns a copy with every occurrence of one substring replaced by another.

functions.name: split
functions.comment: Splits the string by the separator and returns the parts.

functions.name: starts_with
functions.comment: Returns true when the string starts with the prefix.

functions.name: substring
functions.comment: Returns the substring from the byte index to the end, or null if the index is invalid.

functions.name: substring_range
functions.comment: Returns the substring in the byte range, or null if the range is invalid.

functions.name: to_bytes
functions.comment: Returns the UTF-8 bytes of the string.

functions.name: to_lowercase
functions.comment: Returns a lowercase copy of the string.

functions.name: to_uppercase
functions.comment: Returns an uppercase copy of the string.

functions.name: trim
functions.comment: Returns a copy of the string without leading or trailing whitespace.

functions.name: from_hex
functions.comment: Decodes a hexadecimal string into bytes.

functions.name: contains
functions.comment: Returns true when the byte sequence contains the byte.

functions.name: extend
functions.comment: Appends another byte sequence to the end.

functions.name: first
functions.comment: Returns the first byte, or null when empty.

functions.name: get
functions.comment: Returns the byte at the index, or null if out of bounds.

functions.name: last
functions.comment: Returns the last byte, or null when empty.

functions.name: len
functions.comment: Returns the number of bytes.

functions.name: pop
functions.comment: Removes and returns the last byte, or null when empty.

functions.name: push
functions.comment: Appends one byte to the end.

functions.name: remove
functions.comment: Removes and returns the byte at the index, shifting later bytes left.

functions.name: slice
functions.comment: Returns a copy of the bytes in the range.

functions.name: split_off
functions.comment: Splits the bytes at the index, keeping the first part and returning the second.

functions.name: to_array
functions.comment: Converts the bytes to an array of u8 values.

functions.name: to_hex
functions.comment: Encodes the bytes as a lowercase hexadecimal string.

functions.name: truncate
functions.comment: Shortens the byte sequence to the requested size.

functions.name: contains
functions.comment: Returns true when the array contains the element.

functions.name: extend
functions.comment: Appends all elements from another array.

functions.name: first
functions.comment: Returns the first element, or null when empty.

functions.name: get
functions.comment: Returns the element at the index, or null if out of bounds.

functions.name: index_of
functions.comment: Returns the first index of the element, or null when absent.

functions.name: insert
functions.comment: Inserts an element at the index, shifting later elements right.

functions.name: iter
functions.comment: Creates an iterator over the array elements.

functions.name: last
functions.comment: Returns the last element, or null when empty.

functions.name: len
functions.comment: Returns the number of elements in the array.

functions.name: map
functions.comment: Calls the mapper for each element and returns the mapped values.

functions.name: pop
functions.comment: Removes and returns the last element, or null when empty.

functions.name: push
functions.comment: Appends an element to the end of the array.

functions.name: remove
functions.comment: Removes and returns the element at the index, shifting later elements left.

functions.name: reverse
functions.comment: Reverses the array in place.

functions.name: slice
functions.comment: Returns a shallow slice of the array for the range.

functions.name: sort
functions.comment: Sorts the array in ascending or descending order.

functions.name: sort_by_key
functions.comment: Sorts the array by keys returned from the key function.

functions.name: split_off
functions.comment: Splits the array at the index, keeping the first part and returning the second.

functions.name: swap_remove
functions.comment: Removes and returns the element at the index by swapping in the last element.

functions.name: truncate
functions.comment: Shortens the array to the requested size.

functions.name: clear
functions.comment: Removes all entries from the map.

functions.name: contains_key
functions.comment: Returns true when the map contains the key.

functions.name: entries
functions.comment: Returns all key-value pairs in insertion order.

functions.name: get
functions.comment: Returns the value for the key, or null when absent.

functions.name: insert
functions.comment: Inserts a key-value pair and returns the previous value, or null.

functions.name: keys
functions.comment: Returns all keys in insertion order.

functions.name: len
functions.comment: Returns the number of entries in the map.

functions.name: shift_remove
functions.comment: Removes a key while preserving map order and returns its value, or null.

functions.name: swap_remove
functions.comment: Removes a key by swapping with the last entry and returns its value, or null.

functions.name: values
functions.comment: Returns all values in insertion order.

functions.name: collect
functions.comment: Collects all values in the range into an array.

functions.name: contains
functions.comment: Returns true when the range contains the element.

functions.name: count
functions.comment: Returns the number of values in the range.

functions.name: max
functions.comment: Returns the range upper bound.

functions.name: min
functions.comment: Returns the range lower bound.

functions.name: expect
functions.comment: Returns the contained value or fails with the provided message when it is null.

functions.name: is_none
functions.comment: Returns true when the optional value is null.

functions.name: is_some
functions.comment: Returns true when the optional value contains a value.

functions.name: unwrap
functions.comment: Returns the contained value or fails if it is null.

functions.name: unwrap_or
functions.comment: Returns the contained value or the provided default when it is null.

functions.name: unwrap_or_else
functions.comment: Returns the contained value or calls the fallback closure when it is null.

functions.name: from_bytes
functions.comment: Deserializes an address from bytes.

functions.name: from_string
functions.comment: Parses an address from its string representation.

functions.name: is_mainnet
functions.comment: Returns whether the address targets mainnet.

functions.name: to_bytes
functions.comment: Serializes the address to bytes.

functions.name: to_point
functions.comment: Returns the address public key as a Ristretto point.

functions.name: to_string
functions.comment: Encodes the address as a string.

functions.name: new
functions.signature: ArbitraryRangeProof::new(max_value: u64, delta_commitment: RistrettoPoint, eq_commitment_proof: CommitmentEqualityProof, range_proof: RangeProof) ⟶ ArbitraryRangeProof
functions.comment: Creates an arbitrary range proof wrapper from its components.

functions.name: commitment_eq_proof
functions.comment: Returns the commitment equality proof inside the arbitrary range proof.

functions.name: delta_commitment
functions.comment: Returns the delta commitment for the arbitrary range proof.

functions.name: max_value
functions.comment: Returns the maximum value covered by the arbitrary range proof.

functions.name: range_proof
functions.comment: Returns the range proof inside the arbitrary range proof.

functions.name: verify
functions.signature: verify(source_pubkey: RistrettoPoint, source_ciphertext: Ciphertext, transcript: Transcript) ⟶ bool
functions.comment: Verifies the arbitrary range proof for the source ciphertext.

functions.name: create
functions.signature: Asset::create(id: u64, name: string, ticker: string, decimals: u8, max_supply: MaxSupplyMode) ⟶ optional<Asset>
functions.comment: Creates a new asset owned by the current contract.

functions.name: get_by_hash
functions.comment: Returns an asset by hash, if it exists.

functions.name: get_by_id
functions.comment: Returns an asset by local id, if it exists.

functions.name: get_contract_hash
functions.comment: Returns the contract hash that owns the asset, if any.

functions.name: get_creator
functions.comment: Returns the creator contract hash for the asset, if any.

functions.name: get_creator_id
functions.comment: Returns the creator contract id for the asset, if any.

functions.name: get_decimals
functions.comment: Returns the decimal precision for the asset.

functions.name: get_hash
functions.comment: Returns the asset hash.

functions.name: get_id
functions.comment: Returns the contract id that owns the asset, if any.

functions.name: get_max_supply
functions.comment: Returns the configured maximum supply for the asset, if any.

functions.name: get_name
functions.comment: Returns the self-declared asset name.

functions.name: get_owner
functions.comment: Returns the current owner contract hash for the asset, if any.

functions.name: get_supply
functions.comment: Returns the current circulating supply for the asset.

functions.name: get_ticker
functions.comment: Returns the asset ticker.

functions.name: is_mintable
functions.comment: Returns whether the asset supply can still be minted.

functions.name: is_read_only
functions.comment: Returns whether the current contract can only read this asset.

functions.name: mint
functions.comment: Mints new supply to the current contract when the asset permits it.

functions.name: transfer_ownership
functions.comment: Transfers asset ownership to another contract when allowed.

functions.name: delete
functions.comment: Deletes the current cursor entry.

functions.name: next
functions.comment: Returns the next cursor entry, if any.

functions.name: new
functions.comment: Creates a BTree store for the given namespace.

functions.name: delete
functions.comment: Deletes a unique key from the BTree store.

functions.name: get
functions.comment: Returns the value for a unique key in the BTree store, if any.

functions.name: insert
functions.comment: Inserts a key and value into the BTree store.

functions.name: len
functions.comment: Returns the number of entries in the BTree store.

functions.name: seek
functions.signature: seek(key: bytes, bias: BTreeSeekBias, ascending: bool) ⟶ (BTreeCursor, optional<Entry>)
functions.comment: Creates a cursor at the requested key using the seek bias and direction.

functions.name: new
functions.comment: Creates a balance proof wrapper from its components.

functions.name: amount
functions.comment: Returns the amount claimed by the balance proof.

functions.name: commitment_eq_proof
functions.comment: Returns the commitment equality proof inside the balance proof.

functions.name: verify
functions.signature: verify(source_pubkey: RistrettoPoint, source_ciphertext: Ciphertext, transcript: Transcript) ⟶ bool
functions.comment: Verifies the balance proof for the source ciphertext.

functions.name: current
functions.comment: Returns the current block context.

functions.name: extra_nonce
functions.comment: Returns the block extra nonce bytes.

functions.name: hash
functions.comment: Returns the block hash.

functions.name: height
functions.comment: Returns the block height.

functions.name: miner
functions.comment: Returns the miner address for the block.

functions.name: nonce
functions.comment: Returns the block nonce.

functions.name: timestamp
functions.comment: Returns the block timestamp.

functions.name: tips
functions.comment: Returns the block tip hashes.

functions.name: transactions
functions.comment: Returns the transactions included in the block.

functions.name: transactions_count
functions.comment: Returns the number of transactions in the block.

functions.name: transactions_hashes
functions.comment: Returns the hashes of the transactions included in the block.

functions.name: version
functions.comment: Returns the block version.

functions.name: add_ct
functions.comment: Adds another ciphertext to this ciphertext in place.

functions.name: add_scalar
functions.comment: Adds a scalar to this ciphertext in place.

functions.name: generate
functions.comment: Generates a ciphertext for an address and plaintext amount.

functions.name: new
functions.comment: Creates a ciphertext from commitment and handle points.

functions.name: sub_ct
functions.comment: Subtracts another ciphertext from this ciphertext in place.

functions.name: sub_scalar
functions.comment: Subtracts a scalar from this ciphertext in place.

functions.name: zero
functions.comment: Returns a zero ciphertext.

functions.name: add
functions.comment: Adds a plaintext value to the ciphertext in place.

functions.name: commitment
functions.comment: Returns the ciphertext commitment point.

functions.name: div
functions.comment: Divides the ciphertext by a plaintext value in place.

functions.name: handle
functions.comment: Returns the ciphertext handle point.

functions.name: mul
functions.comment: Multiplies the ciphertext by a plaintext value in place.

functions.name: sub
functions.comment: Subtracts a plaintext value from the ciphertext in place.

functions.name: verify
functions.signature: verify(commitment: RistrettoPoint, dest_pubkey: RistrettoPoint, source_pubkey: RistrettoPoint, dest_handle: RistrettoPoint, source_handle: RistrettoPoint, transcript: Transcript) ⟶ bool
functions.comment: Verifies that the ciphertext handles match the commitment and public keys.

functions.name: verify
functions.signature: verify(source_pubkey: RistrettoPoint, ciphertext: Ciphertext, commitment: RistrettoPoint, transcript: Transcript) ⟶ bool
functions.comment: Verifies equality between a ciphertext commitment and a plain commitment.

functions.name: new
functions.comment: Loads a contract handle by hash, if available.

functions.name: call
functions.signature: call(chunk_id: u16, args: any[], deposits: map<Hash, u64>) ⟶ void<any>
functions.comment: Calls a callable chunk on this contract and optionally deposits funds.

functions.name: delegate
functions.comment: Delegates a call to this contract so it runs as the caller's contract.

functions.name: get_hash
functions.comment: Returns this contract hash.

functions.name: listen_event
functions.signature: listen_event(id: u64, callback: fn(any[]) -> u64, max_gas: u64) ⟶ bool
functions.comment: Registers the current contract as a listener for this contract's event.

functions.name: blake3
functions.comment: Computes the BLAKE3 hash of the input bytes.

functions.name: from_array
functions.comment: Creates a hash from a u8 array.

functions.name: from_bytes
functions.comment: Creates a hash from bytes.

functions.name: from_hex
functions.comment: Parses a hash from a hexadecimal string.

functions.name: from_u256
functions.comment: Creates a hash from a u256 value.

functions.name: max
functions.comment: Returns the maximum hash value.

functions.name: sha3
functions.comment: Computes the SHA3 hash of the input bytes.

functions.name: zero
functions.comment: Returns the all-zero hash.

functions.name: to_array
functions.comment: Returns the hash bytes as a u8 array.

functions.name: to_bytes
functions.comment: Serializes the hash to bytes.

functions.name: to_hex
functions.comment: Encodes the hash as a hexadecimal string.

functions.name: to_u256
functions.comment: Interprets the hash as a u256 value.

functions.name: empty
functions.comment: Creates an iterator that yields no values.

functions.name: once
functions.comment: Creates an iterator that yields one value.

functions.name: unfold
functions.signature: Iterator::unfold(seed: T0, f: closure(T0) -> optional<(T1, T0)>) ⟶ Iterator
functions.comment: Creates an iterator by repeatedly calling a closure with evolving state.

functions.name: all
functions.comment: Returns true when every yielded value matches the predicate.

functions.name: any
functions.comment: Returns true when any yielded value matches the predicate.

functions.name: chain
functions.comment: Returns an iterator that yields this iterator followed by another.

functions.name: collect
functions.comment: Consumes the iterator and returns all yielded values as an array.

functions.name: count
functions.comment: Consumes the iterator and returns how many values it yields.

functions.name: enumerate
functions.comment: Returns an iterator of index-value pairs.

functions.name: filter
functions.comment: Returns a lazy iterator that keeps values accepted by the predicate.

functions.name: find
functions.comment: Consumes the iterator until a value matches the predicate, returning it or null.

functions.name: flatten
functions.comment: Flattens an iterator of iterators into a single iterator.

functions.name: fold
functions.signature: fold(init: T0, f: closure(T0, T0) -> T0) ⟶ T0
functions.comment: Consumes the iterator and combines values with an accumulator closure.

functions.name: for_each
functions.comment: Consumes the iterator and calls the closure for each value.

functions.name: map
functions.comment: Returns a lazy iterator that applies the mapper closure to each value.

functions.name: next
functions.comment: Advances the iterator and returns the next value, or null when exhausted.

functions.name: position
functions.comment: Returns the index of the first value matching the predicate, or null.

functions.name: rev
functions.comment: Returns an iterator that yields values in reverse order when supported.

functions.name: skip
functions.comment: Returns an iterator that skips the first n values.

functions.name: sum
functions.comment: Consumes the iterator and returns the sum of its values.

functions.name: take
functions.comment: Returns an iterator that yields at most n values.

functions.name: zip
functions.comment: Returns an iterator that pairs values from two iterators until either is exhausted.

functions.name: get_max_supply
functions.comment: Returns the maximum supply encoded in this mode, if any.

functions.name: is_mintable
functions.comment: Returns whether this max supply mode allows minting.

functions.name: new
functions.comment: Creates a temporary memory storage handle, shared or local.

functions.name: delete
functions.comment: Deletes a value from temporary memory storage and returns the previous value, if any.

functions.name: has
functions.comment: Returns whether temporary memory storage contains the key.

functions.name: load
functions.comment: Loads a value from temporary memory storage by key.

functions.name: store
functions.comment: Stores a value in temporary memory storage and returns the previous value, if any.

functions.name: new
functions.signature: OwnershipProof::new(amount: u64, commitment: RistrettoPoint, eq_commitment_proof: CommitmentEqualityProof, range_proof: RangeProof) ⟶ OwnershipProof
functions.comment: Creates an ownership proof wrapper from its components.

functions.name: amount
functions.comment: Returns the amount claimed by the ownership proof.

functions.name: commitment
functions.comment: Returns the commitment claimed by the ownership proof.

functions.name: commitment_eq_proof
functions.comment: Returns the commitment equality proof inside the ownership proof.

functions.name: range_proof
functions.comment: Returns the range proof inside the ownership proof.

functions.name: verify
functions.signature: verify(source_pubkey: RistrettoPoint, source_ciphertext: Ciphertext, transcript: Transcript) ⟶ bool
functions.comment: Verifies the ownership proof for the source ciphertext.

functions.name: new
functions.comment: Creates a deterministic random generator for this execution.

functions.name: next_bool
functions.comment: Generates the next deterministic random boolean.

functions.name: next_u128
functions.comment: Generates the next deterministic random u128.

functions.name: next_u16
functions.comment: Generates the next deterministic random u16.

functions.name: next_u256
functions.comment: Generates the next deterministic random u256.

functions.name: next_u32
functions.comment: Generates the next deterministic random u32.

functions.name: next_u64
functions.comment: Generates the next deterministic random u64.

functions.name: next_u8
functions.comment: Generates the next deterministic random u8.

functions.name: verify_multiple
functions.signature: verify_multiple(commitments: RistrettoPoint[], transcript: Transcript, n: u8) ⟶ bool
functions.comment: Verifies a range proof for multiple commitments.

functions.name: verify_single
functions.signature: verify_single(commitment: RistrettoPoint, transcript: Transcript, n: u8) ⟶ bool
functions.comment: Verifies a range proof for a single commitment.

functions.name: new
functions.comment: Opens read-only storage for another contract by hash, if available.

functions.name: has
functions.comment: Returns whether another contract's read-only storage contains the key.

functions.name: load
functions.comment: Loads a value from another contract's read-only storage by key.

functions.name: from_bytes
functions.comment: Deserializes a Ristretto point from bytes.

functions.name: identity
functions.comment: Returns the identity Ristretto point.

functions.name: add
functions.comment: Returns the sum of this point and another point.

functions.name: add_scalar
functions.comment: Returns this point plus the scalar multiplied by the base point.

functions.name: div_scalar
functions.comment: Returns this point divided by a non-zero scalar.

functions.name: is_identity
functions.comment: Returns whether the point is the identity.

functions.name: mul_scalar
functions.comment: Returns this point multiplied by a scalar.

functions.name: sub
functions.comment: Returns this point minus another point.

functions.name: sub_scalar
functions.comment: Returns this point minus the scalar multiplied by the base point.

functions.name: to_bytes
functions.comment: Serializes the Ristretto point to bytes.

functions.name: from_bytes
functions.comment: Deserializes a scalar from bytes, if valid.

functions.name: from_u64
functions.comment: Creates a scalar from a u64 value.

functions.name: hash_from_bytes
functions.comment: Hashes bytes into a scalar.

functions.name: add
functions.comment: Returns the sum of this scalar and another scalar.

functions.name: div
functions.comment: Returns this scalar divided by a non-zero scalar.

functions.name: invert
functions.comment: Returns the multiplicative inverse of the scalar.

functions.name: is_zero
functions.comment: Returns whether the scalar is zero.

functions.name: mul
functions.comment: Returns this scalar multiplied by another scalar.

functions.name: mul_base
functions.comment: Returns the scalar multiplied by the base point.

functions.name: sub
functions.comment: Returns this scalar minus another scalar.

functions.name: to_bytes
functions.comment: Serializes the scalar to bytes.

functions.name: get_pending
functions.comment: Returns a pending scheduled execution for the topoheight, if any.

functions.name: new_at_block_end
functions.signature: ScheduledExecution::new_at_block_end(callback: fn(any[]) -> u64, args: any[], max_gas: u64, use_contract_balance: bool) ⟶ optional<ScheduledExecution>
functions.comment: Schedules a callback execution at the end of the current block.

functions.name: new_at_topoheight
functions.signature: ScheduledExecution::new_at_topoheight(callback: fn(any[]) -> u64, args: any[], max_gas: u64, use_contract_balance: bool, topoheight: u64) ⟶ optional<ScheduledExecution>
functions.comment: Schedules a callback execution at a specific topoheight.

functions.name: get_hash
functions.comment: Returns the hash generated for the scheduled execution.

functions.name: get_max_gas
functions.comment: Returns the maximum gas allowed for the scheduled execution.

functions.name: get_topoheight
functions.comment: Returns the topoheight at which the execution is scheduled, if any.

functions.name: increase_max_gas
functions.comment: Increases the max gas for a pending scheduled execution.

functions.name: from_bytes
functions.comment: Deserializes a signature from bytes.

functions.name: verify
functions.comment: Verifies the signature against the data and public key point.

functions.name: new
functions.comment: Creates a persistent storage handle for the current contract.

functions.name: delete
functions.comment: Deletes a value from contract storage and returns the previous value, if any.

functions.name: has
functions.comment: Returns whether contract storage contains the key.

functions.name: load
functions.comment: Loads a value from contract storage by key.

functions.name: store
functions.comment: Stores a value in contract storage and returns the previous value, if any.

functions.name: clone
functions.comment: Returns a deep clone of the value.

functions.name: concat
functions.comment: Flattens one level of nested arrays into a single array.

functions.name: current
functions.comment: Returns the current transaction when execution was started by a transaction.

functions.name: fee
functions.comment: Returns the transaction fee in atomic units.

functions.name: hash
functions.comment: Returns the transaction hash.

functions.name: nonce
functions.comment: Returns the transaction nonce.

functions.name: signature
functions.comment: Returns the transaction signature.

functions.name: source
functions.comment: Returns the source address of the transaction.

functions.name: new
functions.comment: Creates a transcript with the given label.

functions.name: append_message
functions.comment: Appends labeled bytes to the transcript.

functions.name: append_point
functions.comment: Appends a labeled Ristretto point to the transcript.

functions.name: append_scalar
functions.comment: Appends a labeled scalar to the transcript.

functions.name: challenge_bytes
functions.comment: Derives challenge bytes from the transcript with the given label and length.

functions.name: challenge_scalar
functions.comment: Derives a challenge scalar from the transcript with the given label.

functions.name: validate_and_append_point
functions.comment: Validates and appends a labeled Ristretto point to the transcript.
